description_long: This is a detached bungalow set within a walled plot, featuring a dark, multi-faceted hip roof with dormer windows and a combination of stone and wood exterior walls. The property includes a well-maintained garden with flower beds, a vineyard, and several trees, as well as a paved driveway leading to a garage or outbuilding. The front of the bungalow has a covered porch with steps, and the rear includes a patio area. The windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and grouped patterns, with some larger windows facing the garden. The surrounding stone wall encloses the entire property, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall style is reminiscent of a modern Craftsman bungalow with landscaped grounds.
description: A modern Craftsman-style bungalow with a dark hip roof, stone and wood exterior, surrounded by gardens, a vineyard, and a stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and landscaped garden with trees and a driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vineyard, flower beds, and the rear patio area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extensive garden, vineyard, and outbuildings, with the house's back facade visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring more trees, the garden, and a clear look at the side entrance and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
